Directive.name: .hsa_code_object_version
Directive.md_description: Specifies the HSA code object version. Used in code object V2 only.

Directive.name: .hsa_code_object_isa
Directive.md_description: Specifies the instruction set architecture for HSA code object V2. If no arguments are given, the ISA defined by the `-mcpu` option is used.

Directive.name: .amdgpu_hsa_kernel
Directive.md_description: Marks the associated symbol as an HSA kernel (code object V2). Creates metadata indicating the symbol is an AMD GPU kernel entry point.

Directive.name: .amd_kernel_code_t
Directive.md_description: Begins an AMD kernel code table entry block (code object V2). Contains key-value pairs that configure kernel execution parameters. Must end with `.end_amd_kernel_code_t`.

Directive.name: .end_amd_kernel_code_t
Directive.md_description: Ends an `.amd_kernel_code_t` block (code object V2).

Directive.name: .amdgcn_target
Directive.md_description: Specifies the target triple and target ID for the assembled code object V3+. The target ID includes the processor name and optional feature flags (e.g. `"amdgcn-amd-amdhsa--gfx1100"`).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_code_object_version
Directive.md_description: Declares the AMDHSA code object version (3, 4, 5, or 6). Must appear before any `.amdhsa_kernel` directives.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_kernel
Directive.md_description: Begins a kernel descriptor block for a named kernel (code object V3+). Contains sub-directives that set kernel metadata. Must end with `.end_amdhsa_kernel`.

Directive.name: .end_amdhsa_kernel
Directive.md_description: Ends an `.amdhsa_kernel` block (code object V3+).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_next_free_vgpr
Directive.md_description: Specifies the first unused VGPR number for the kernel. The hardware uses this to allocate the VGPR block. Usually set to the result of the `.amdgcn.next_free_vgpr` predefined symbol.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_next_free_sgpr
Directive.md_description: Specifies the first unused SGPR number for the kernel. Usually set to the result of the `.amdgcn.next_free_sgpr` predefined symbol.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_accum_offset
Directive.md_description: (GFX90A+) Specifies the VGPR offset at which AGPRs begin. Must be aligned to 4. Only valid when AGPRs are in use.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_group_segment_fixed_size
Directive.md_description: Specifies the fixed LDS (local data store / group memory) allocation in bytes for the kernel.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_private_segment_fixed_size
Directive.md_description: Specifies the per-work-item private segment (scratch memory) size in bytes for the kernel.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_kernarg_size
Directive.md_description: Specifies the kernel argument buffer size in bytes. Must match the total size of all kernel arguments.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_user_sgpr_count
Directive.md_description: Specifies the number of user SGPRs that are set up by the hardware before the kernel starts executing.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_user_sgpr_private_segment_buffer
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the private segment buffer descriptor is passed in user SGPRs (0 or 1). Occupies 4 SGPRs when enabled.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_user_sgpr_kernarg_segment_ptr
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether a pointer to the kernel argument buffer is passed in user SGPRs (0 or 1). Occupies 2 SGPRs when enabled.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_user_sgpr_dispatch_ptr
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the dispatch packet pointer is passed in user SGPRs (0 or 1). Occupies 2 SGPRs when enabled.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_user_sgpr_queue_ptr
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the queue pointer is passed in user SGPRs (0 or 1). Occupies 2 SGPRs when enabled.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_user_sgpr_flat_scratch_init
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the flat scratch init value is passed in user SGPRs (0 or 1). Occupies 2 SGPRs when enabled.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_user_sgpr_private_segment_size
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the private segment size is passed in a user SGPR (0 or 1).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_system_sgpr_private_segment_wavefront_offset
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the private segment wavefront offset is passed via a system SGPR (0 or 1).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_system_sgpr_workgroup_id_x
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the workgroup ID in the X dimension is passed via a system SGPR (0 or 1).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_system_sgpr_workgroup_id_y
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the workgroup ID in the Y dimension is passed via a system SGPR (0 or 1).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_system_sgpr_workgroup_id_z
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether the workgroup ID in the Z dimension is passed via a system SGPR (0 or 1).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_system_sgpr_workgroup_info
Directive.md_description: Indicates whether workgroup info is passed via a system SGPR (0 or 1).

Directive.name: .amdhsa_system_vgpr_workitem_id
Directive.md_description: Specifies which work-item IDs are initialised in the first system VGPR: 0 = X only, 1 = X and Y, 2 = X, Y, and Z.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_float_round_mode_32
Directive.md_description: Sets the rounding mode for 32-bit floating-point operations. Values: 0=nearest-even, 1=+inf, 2=-inf, 3=toward-zero.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_float_round_mode_16_64
Directive.md_description: Sets the rounding mode for 16-bit and 64-bit floating-point operations. Values: 0=nearest-even, 1=+inf, 2=-inf, 3=toward-zero.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_float_denorm_mode_32
Directive.md_description: Configures denormal number handling for 32-bit floating-point: 0=flush both, 1=flush output only, 2=flush input only, 3=no flush.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_float_denorm_mode_16_64
Directive.md_description: Configures denormal number handling for 16-bit and 64-bit floating-point: 0=flush both, 1=flush output only, 2=flush input only, 3=no flush.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_dx10_clamp
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) DX10 clamp mode. When enabled, NaN inputs to floating-point operations are clamped to 0.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_ieee_mode
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) IEEE 754 floating-point mode. When disabled, NaN and infinity results may differ from the standard.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_fp16_overflow
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) FP16 overflow saturation. When enabled, FP16 operations that overflow clamp to ±infinity.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_tg_split
Directive.md_description: (GFX90A+) Enables (1) or disables (0) thread-group split mode.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_workgroup_processor_mode
Directive.md_description: (GFX10+) Enables (1) or disables (0) workgroup processor (WGP) mode. WGP mode allows a workgroup to span two compute units.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_memory_ordered
Directive.md_description: (GFX10+) Enables (1) or disables (0) memory-ordered mode.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_forward_progress
Directive.md_description: (GFX10+) Indicates whether (1) or not (0) the kernel guarantees forward progress.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_shared_vgpr_count
Directive.md_description: (GFX10+) Specifies the number of shared VGPRs used for wavefront sharing. Must be a multiple of 8.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_exception_fp_ieee_invalid_op
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the IEEE invalid operation floating-point exception.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_exception_fp_denorm_src
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the denormalized source floating-point exception.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_exception_fp_ieee_div_zero
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the IEEE divide-by-zero floating-point exception.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_exception_fp_ieee_overflow
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the IEEE overflow floating-point exception.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_exception_fp_ieee_underflow
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the IEEE underflow floating-point exception.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_exception_fp_ieee_inexact
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the IEEE inexact result floating-point exception.

Directive.name: .amdhsa_exception_int_div_zero
Directive.md_description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the integer divide-by-zero exception.

Directive.name: .amdgpu_metadata
Directive.md_description: Introduces an AMDGPU metadata block for code object V3+. The block contains YAML-encoded metadata describing kernels and the code object. Must end with `.end_amdgpu_metadata`.

Directive.name: .end_amdgpu_metadata
Directive.md_description: Ends an `.amdgpu_metadata` block.

Directive.name: .amdgcn.gfx_generation_number
Directive.md_description: Predefined assembler symbol that expands to the GFX generation number of the target (e.g. 11 for GFX11, 12 for GFX12).

Directive.name: .amdgcn.gfx_generation_minor
Directive.md_description: Predefined assembler symbol that expands to the minor generation version number of the target.

Directive.name: .amdgcn.gfx_generation_stepping
Directive.md_description: Predefined assembler symbol that expands to the stepping version number of the target.

Directive.name: .amdgcn.next_free_vgpr
Directive.md_description: Predefined assembler symbol that tracks the highest VGPR number used so far plus one. Use in `.amdhsa_next_free_vgpr` to automatically set the correct value.

Directive.name: .amdgcn.next_free_sgpr
Directive.md_description: Predefined assembler symbol that tracks the highest SGPR number used so far plus one. Use in `.amdhsa_next_free_sgpr` to automatically set the correct value.
